topic: I was a security guard at an empty hospital that was scheduled for demolition
title: I Was a Security Guard at an Empty Hospital Before They Tore It Down | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There was an elevator in Mercy General that should not exist. I found it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a set of elevator doors in an empty hospital corridor at night, the floor indicator above the doors showing the number six lit in amber, the rest of the panel dark, fluorescent light flickering overhead, scuffed institutional floor in the foreground, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Eight floors. Decommissioned. I was the only one inside.
scenes.image_prompt: interior of an empty hospital corridor at night, long linoleum hallway stretching into darkness, fluorescent tubes flickering overhead, empty nurse station visible on the left, wheelchairs folded against the wall, deep shadows at the far end, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every night, same route. Nothing moved.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an abandoned hospital room, two empty metal bed frames, bare mattresses stripped of linens, window with blinds half open letting in dim street light, deep shadows in the corners, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the fourth night I found the elevator on floor six.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of elevator doors in an empty hospital hallway, the floor indicator above the doors showing the number six lit in amber, the rest of the panel dark, fluorescent light buzzing overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

close up of a hospital floor directory mounted on a wall, laminated plastic listing floors one through five, the sixth floor entry completely blank, dim corridor light, slight water stain on the board, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stood there. Doors closed. Hum stopped.
scenes.image_prompt: view from directly in front of closed elevator doors in an empty hospital, the metal doors slightly dented and scuffed, the call button dark, overhead fluorescent tube flickering, deep silence implied by the stillness of the composition, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a walkie talkie radio held in a hand against a backdrop of a dark hospital corridor, the small screen glowing green, static implied by the held button, dim ambient light from a distant window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He said there was no elevator on that wing.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of an empty hospital corridor viewed from an angle, institutional drop ceiling, scuffed linoleum floor, no elevator doors visible on either wall, a single exit sign glowing red at the far end, deep shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I turned back. The doors were open now. Inside was dark.
scenes.image_prompt: perspective shot looking directly into the open doors of an old hospital elevator, the interior completely dark beyond the threshold, scuffed metal walls visible just inside, overhead corridor light casting a rectangle of light on the elevator floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the floor of the elevator sat a single patient intake form, filled out in pencil, dated that morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a yellowed paper form lying on the scuffed linoleum floor of an elevator interior, pencil handwriting visible but illegible, one corner of the form curled upward, dim ambient light from the corridor spilling in, deep shadow behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left and never filed a report.
scenes.image_prompt: rear view of a security guard in a dark uniform walking away down a long empty hospital corridor toward an exit sign, the corridor receding in deep perspective, institutional lighting overhead, no other figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Demolition started on schedule. Elevator wing came down last.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a partially demolished hospital building at dawn, one wing still standing while another is reduced to rubble, a construction crane visible against a pale grey sky, chain link fence in foreground, dust haze in the air, vertical 9:16 framing
